non_blocking_risks: Benchmark expectations are intentionally deferred; future users may ask for throughput comparisons.
Lazy TTL cleanup should be documented so users do not expect background sweeps.
missing_tests_or_acceptance_criteria: None for v1 planning. TTL, LRU, capacity, and stats tests are represented in task-004.
dependency_issues: None. Dependencies form a linear DAG: task-001 -> task-002 -> task-003 -> task-004.
schema_or_gate_issues: None. Fixtures conform to the Plan2Agent schemas and approval gates, including clarifying question disposition traceability.
recommended_changes: Keep Redis compatibility explicitly listed as a non-goal in generated specs.
Add benchmark tasks only after a user changes the optimization decision.
